title: Link a group to another board
excerpt:
Hey there, 
Can I link/copy/paste a group to another board? and update them at the same time? 
Thanks!

posts.author: eddie (Yiran Mao)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.cookedHtml: Hey @eddie - can you expand on your use case? And can you share with us the set up of these boards?
